data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) Both commits (ac0f1f166578, 9c664af37ff6) are on origin/main and tagged on knot. (2) No OpenRouter references remain in src/. (3) OpenCode dialect implemented correctly in agent-adapter.ts. (4) Quality gates passed: tsc clean, lint clean, 1855 tests passing, build succeeds. No regressions detected.
